endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: API endpoint to extract data from (e.g. customers, items, salesOrders)

selected_columns.title: Selected Columns
selected_columns.description: Specific columns to extract (leave empty for all columns)

filter_expression.title: Filter Expression
filter_expression.description: OData filter expression to limit results (e.g. displayName eq 'John') - see documentation for supported operators

custom_url_suffix.title: Custom URL Suffix
custom_url_suffix.description: Custom path to append after the endpoint (e.g. 'applyVendorEntries(123)' for endpoints that require IDs in the URL path)

incremental_field.title: Incremental Field
incremental_field.description: Field to use for incremental loading, for example lastModifiedDateTime

initial_since.title: Initial Since Value
initial_since.description: Since which date to download data for the first run (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z), following runs will use the last run time stored in the state file.

table_name.title: Table Name
table_name.description: Name for the output table in Keboola Storage (defaults to endpoint name if empty)

load_type.title: Load Type
load_type.description: If Full load is used, the destination table will be overwritten every run. If Incremental Load is used, data will be upserted into the destination table based on the primary key.

primary_key.title: Primary Key
primary_key.description: List of columns that form the primary key by default: id
